creator: pjfloyd@wanadoo.fr
text:
Created attachment 231492
First fail message

Steps to produce with VirtualBox (I haven't tried a non-virtual box install)

1. Create VM. 4GB RAM 16MB Vido RAM VBoxVGA 20GB IDE Primary Device vdi image OSS audio ICH AC97 network Intel PRO/1000 MT Desktop (NAT).

(this is the same config that I've used with 9/10/11/12/13 without problems).

2. Boot off the dowloaded ISO
In this case
FreeBSD-14.0-CURRENT-amd64-20220127-2c449a4c5a3-252673-disc1.iso
but I've been having this problem for months

3. Select Install

4. Change the keymap to United Kingdom

5. Set the hotname to 'freebsd'

6. SELECT AL THE PACKAGES

7. OK for the dialog saying packages not found locally

8 OK for the Intel NIC

9. Yes for IPV4

10. Yes for DHCP

(lease acquired)

11. Yes for IPv6

12. Yes for SLAAC

13 accept defaults for dns

14. Auto UFS

15. Entire Disk and Yes then MBR

16 Finish

17. Commit

18 leave the default download site as ftp://ftp.freebsd.org

A seroes of errors for the packages is next.
